title: 熊猫布布便携恒温杯 tips for calmer night feeds
subtitle: Warm milk by the bedside, in minutes
voiceover_20s: Still waiting forever to warm milk during night feeds? No convenient hot water when baby wakes up hungry. Pour in, even heat inside the thermos cup, then pour out to the bottle. Warm milk poured out ready for the bottle — without leaving the room. Save this for your next night feed.

storyboard.visual: 出门旅游：近景口播/问题特写
storyboard.voiceover_en: Still waiting forever to warm milk during night feeds?
storyboard.subtitle_en: Still waiting forever to warm milk during night feeds?
storyboard.visual_prompt: 出门旅游：近景口播/问题特写；产品：熊猫布布便携恒温杯；人群：0-12月新手爸妈；场景：出门旅游（全片统一，禁止混入其他场景）；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶，圆柱杯体）；用法：奶液倒入杯内加热保温，再倒出到奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、奶瓶插入杯口、奶瓶浸在杯中加热（不是奶瓶暖奶器）；竖屏9:16
storyboard.seedance_prompt: Hook shot opening, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, sharp close-up of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference product hero on bedside table, separate baby bottle beside it, cinematic soft light, subtle push-in, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Mood: Still waiting forever to warm milk during night feeds?

storyboard.visual: 出门旅游：呈现痛点（外出没热水、加热太慢宝宝哭闹、找微波炉麻烦、手忙脚乱）
